description: You are a head powerlifting coach setting up a specific peaking block. Log into the wger application at http://localhost (username: admin, password: adminadmin) and create a workout routine named 'Smolov Jr. Bench'. The routine must consist of 4 distinct training days, each including the 'Bench Press' exercise with the following configurations: Day 1 (6 sets of 6 reps), Day 2 (7 sets of 5 reps), Day 3 (8 sets of 4 reps), and Day 4 (10 sets of 3 reps).
